name: konfig.ts
description: Typesafe Kubernetes + ArgoCD configuration in TypeScript, powered by Effect.

scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/core build && bun run --cwd packages/k8s build && bun run --cwd packages/argocd build && bun run --cwd packages/cli build
scripts.check: bun run --cwd packages/core check && bun run --cwd packages/k8s check && bun run --cwd packages/argocd check && bun run --cwd packages/cli check
scripts.test: bun run --cwd packages/core test && bun run --cwd packages/k8s test && bun run --cwd packages/argocd test
scripts.lint: bun run --cwd packages/core lint && bun run --cwd packages/k8s lint && bun run --cwd packages/argocd lint && bun run --cwd packages/cli lint
scripts.lint:apply: bun run --cwd packages/core lint:apply && bun run --cwd packages/k8s lint:apply && bun run --cwd packages/argocd lint:apply && bun run --cwd packages/cli lint:apply
